title: drymocallis oregana
intro: Drymocallis oregana, also known as Western yarrow or Oregon yarrow, is a perennial herb native to the northwestern United States and southwestern Canada. The plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects, making it useful for treating wounds and skin irritations. The health benefits of Drymocallis oregana include reducing fever, alleviating digestive issues, and supporting the immune system. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used to treat various health conditions, including colds, flu, and menstrual cramps.
